news.headline: Afghan Taliban aware of Pakistan’s concerns, must take verifiable steps for ceasefire: senior security official
news.summary:
<p>PESHAWAR: A senior security official has said that the Afghan Taliban were well aware of Pakistan’s concerns and demands, adding that the regime needed to take “verifiable steps” if it wanted a ceasefire or a dialogue.</p>
